ground_truth.title: New Gym Equipment (December 2025) | Garage Gym Lab
ground_truth.main_content: Garage Gym Lab regularly researches, tracks, and aggregates the best fitness equipment releases so you don't have to. Whether you're looking for a new barbell, fresh kicks, or an upgraded power rack, we have you covered. REP is one of the best at adding unique touches to gym equipment, making them one of the most active and innovative manufacturers out there. They offer a wide range of equipment, including racks, benches, bars, plates, cable systems, and more. All of their products ship for free at reasonable prices. The REP BlackWing Bench includes a ladder-style back and their patented Zero-Gap seat, stores vertically, and is available in multiple colors. The AB-5200 2.0 includes an option for an adjustable back post for decline and you can now customize your color scheme. The FT-5000 2.0 is a well-featured functional trainer with 224lb dual stacks and a 2:1 weight ratio, includes 21 cable positions and several pull-up handles. The upgraded AB-3000 is one of the best-value flat, incline, decline benches on the market. The REP Open Trap Bar is our pick as the best trap bar for most people - it's rackable, has round tubing, and includes several handle options. The REP Safety Squat Bar is well-balanced with chrome Olympic-sized sleeves, knurled handles, and comfortable padding. The REP Ares is a rack-mounted cable system built for the PR-4000 and 5000 racks, offers lat pull, low row, and adjustable trolleys. The REP Athena is a single or dual-column cable attachment with up to 220lb stacks, fully-adjustable trolleys for a variety of exercises. Rogue is the most well-known equipment manufacturer in the home gym industry with a massive, ever-growing catalog. The Rogue Woodway Curved Treadmill is a manual, curved treadmill that promotes better running form. The Rogue Manta Ray Adjustable Bench is a full flat, incline, and decline bench with a unique ladder design and multiple seat and back adjustments. The Rogue Hybrid Power Bar is a stainless steel power bar with a 28.5mm shaft and aggressive knurling. The Kabuki Kadillac Bar is now made by Rogue, a versatile cambered multi-grip bar with three knurled handle positions and an arched profile. The Rogue Alpaca Sled is an enhanced version of the Echo Dog Sled that includes a loadable pan. The Rogue CB-4 is a 38mm cambered buffalo bar to alleviate shoulder, elbow, and wrist stress. Titan is one of the leading value providers of fitness equipment, also one of the most active fitness companies in terms of product releases. The Titan Open Trap Bar is a versatile and rackable open trap bar with dual handle heights and chrome, Olympic-sized sleeves. The Titan EZ Grip Bumper Plates have uniquely contoured plates with raised rubber edges to make handling easier. The Titan Angled Multi-Grip Bar v3 has an upgraded version that includes a narrower frame width and center knurl rings, offers four handle widths. The Titan Adjustable Kettlebell comes with six cast plates for a maximum load of 40lbs, includes a 28mm handle and a base weight of 10lbs. The Reebok Legacy Lifter III brings back the classic Reebok Pump technology. The Bells of Steel Blitz Manual Treadmill includes built-in optional magnetic resistance to mimic sled pushes. The Bells of Steel Hydra is a full lineup of 3x3 11-gauge steel racks with 5/8 inch holes and loads of attachment options. The XEBEX Air Ski Trainer has 10 levels of air resistance and a programmable console, available as a free-standing or wall-mounted unit. The AbMat Genesis Jack Evo weighs less than 1lb but can lift an 800lb bar (400lbs each side), it's affordable and travel-friendly.
with: Gym equipment is constantly evolving to incorporate new features and enhancements.
REP is one of the best at adding unique touches to gym equipment, making them one of the most active and innovative manufacturers out there.
Rogue is the most well-known equipment manufacturer in the home gym industry.
Titan is one of the leading value providers of fitness equipment and one of the most active fitness companies in terms of product releases.
This new ski trainer has 10 levels of air resistance and a programmable console, available as a free-standing or wall-mounted unit.
